candidateFindings.shortQuote: Only 4 year students and US VSLO students are eligible. The application deadline is at least 70 days prior to the start of a rotation.

negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: Verbatim: 'Only 4 year students and US VSLO students are eligible' — international medical schools not eligible at the WSU/DMC visiting-MS lane.
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: DMC's own /elective-visiting-students page exists separately and may have additional/different content; cost and visa absent.

nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) US LCME/COCA MS4 only; (b) VSLO required; (c) 70-day lead time; (d) DMC + MSU + WSU dual affiliation noted; (e) cost + visa NOT_STATED.
plainEnglishSummary: Detroit Medical Center accepts visiting medical students through Wayne State University SOM's VSLO process. Only fourth-year US VSLO students are eligible — international medical schools not eligible. 70-day lead time required. DMC also affiliates with Michigan State University's Osteopathic SOM. Cost and visa policies not stated on the hub.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because MI gained a second P101 packet; verbatim US-VSLO-only restriction captured.
